text: So you've come to Secundus—twelve districts, one old city, and a thousand stories drowning in the gutters.
speaker: Sabatha

choices.text: Mention Veneficturis and the wizard paths.
Say you only need directions and mean to move on.

text: Each district thinks it is the city's true heart. The walls remember what the heralds forget—listen to the stone more than the slogans.
speaker: Sabatha

text: If you mean to stay, learn the alleys before you learn the laws. Secundus forgives curiosity less than it forgives pride.
speaker: Sabatha

text: The academy spires look clean from down here. Up close, they are crowded with ambition—Red rank is only the first rung, and the ladder does not care who climbs.
speaker: Sabatha

text: Whatever your teacher whispers after lamps are lit, weigh it against what the streets shout at noon.
speaker: Sabatha

text: Wise enough for today, then. Secundus keeps its own tally of strangers—try not to become a footnote too soon.
speaker: Sabatha
